overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game. A character walks along a high-rise rooftop at night, overlooking a sprawling neon-lit futuristic city with flying vehicles, then turns toward an industrial helipad area with large storage tanks and a parked aircraft.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rooftop path with the illuminated city skyline visible to the right

entered.detail: sprawling futuristic cityscape with bright pink and red neon signs illuminating the night
multiple flying cars or drones hovering and moving through the dark cloudy sky
metal safety railing running along the edge of the rooftop walkway
concrete rooftop path with subtle lighting along the edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, cloudy night atop a high-rise building. The character walks forward along a concrete rooftop path, with a metal railing on the right overlooking a vast cyberpunk cityscape glowing with neon lights. Flying vehicles drift through the overcast sky above the illuminated towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rooftop with storage tanks and helipad

events.description: character begins turning left away from the city view toward industrial structures
view transitions from neon cityscape to industrial helipad area with large storage tanks

agents.ego_description: turning left while continuing to walk, shifting focus from the city to the industrial helipad area ahead

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal storage tanks with red warning lights on top
bright industrial floodlights on tall poles illuminating the rooftop area
circular helipad marking visible on the rooftop surface ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns left while walking, transitioning from the city overlook to an industrial rooftop zone. Large cylindrical storage tanks with red lights come into view on the left, while bright floodlights illuminate the area ahead. The neon city falls behind as the character approaches a marked helipad.

events.description: approaching the parked aircraft on the helipad, details becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward the parked aircraft on the helipad, passing the industrial storage tanks now on the right

entered.detail: futuristic aircraft or heavy vehicle parked on the helipad with illuminated orange lights

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking toward the helipad, passing the large storage tanks now positioned on the right. A futuristic aircraft with glowing lights becomes visible parked on the landing pad ahead. The scene is dominated by industrial structures and artificial lighting as the character approaches the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a panoramic overlook of a neon-lit metropolis to the stark, artificial lighting of an industrial rooftop. It begins with a character walking along a concrete path beside a metal railing, overlooking a vast cyberpunk cityscape where flying vehicles drift through a dark, cloudy sky. As the character turns left, the glowing city skyline recedes into the background and the environment shifts toward an industrial zone marked by large cylindrical storage tanks with red warning lights. The scene then opens further as the camera passes these tanks, moving under bright floodlights toward a marked helipad. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches a futuristic aircraft with glowing lights parked amidst the surrounding industrial structures.
